description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortNavy blue leather strap with a tang claspNavy blue dial with silver coloured hands Brand logo across the left half of the dial and date aperture at the 3 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rainWarranty: 2 years
